objectives: evaluate three new packaging concepts for an energy drink launch
identify the strongest concept by purchase intent
brief.audience_criteria: US adults 18-34, drank an energy drink in the past 30 days
brief.business_context: concept testing for Q3 product launch
brief.hypothesis: Concept B will outperform on purchase intent

questions.text: Obviously, you would agree that bold packaging is the most important factor in choosing an energy drink, right?
How appealing is this concept and how likely are you to purchase it?
How appealing do you find this energy drink concept?
How much do you like this energy drink design?
Which of these would you say is the most important reason to switch energy drinks?
Wouldn't you say everyone deserves a refreshing energy drink that tastes great and is affordable?
Most people who try this energy drink love it. How would you rate it?
